gaps.msg: High-RPN failure mode FM-051 (RPN=180, S=9) not covered by any operation control — add detection/prevention step
gaps.assumption: Failure mode may require dedicated process step or parameter control

assumptions.rationale: Cycle time based on 600mm tube at 12 m/min line speed incl. color change allowance; continuous extrusion with cut-to-length downstream — per-part cycle time = (0.6m / 12m/min) * 60 = 3s extrusion + 42s batch amortized setup
Single-screw extruder (45mm dia) + vacuum calibration + haul-off + cutter; industry benchmark for PA12 mono-layer fuel tube line
Inline rotary cutter integrated with extruder; 8s includes feeding, clamping, cutting, and part release
Estimated 4 bends per tube at ~7s per bend + load/unload; no 3D model available — bend count and routing unknown
CNC electric servo bending machine for PA12 tube up to 12mm OD; industry benchmark
Two end-forms per tube (both ends); includes heating, forming, cooling, and part release; 12.5s per end
Two connectors per assembly (filter + engine side); includes O-ring loading, connector press-fit, latch verification; 20s per connector
Two press-fit connections (inlet + outlet); includes damper loading, positioning, crimping, and force verification
Manual sleeve placement + 3 clip installations; includes fixture load/unload and visual verification
Pressure decay method: 5s connect + 10s stabilize + 20s measure + 5s disconnect + 5s data record; industry standard for fuel system 100% leak test
Automated bench with dual-channel pressure transducer, sealing fixtures for both QC ends, PLC + barcode scanner; industry benchmark for fuel line leak test
Flush, filter, weigh cycle; 100% during launch then moves to SPC sampling — cycle time for 100% mode
Cap installation (2 pcs) + label print/apply + place in container
Standard automotive 2-shift capacity assumption; actual shift pattern TBD with customer volume confirmation

operations.name: Tube Extrusion (PA12)
operations.equipment_type: Single-screw extruder with calibration tank + haul-off
key_parameters: Melt temperature 220 +/- 5 degC
Line speed 12 m/min (8x6mm) / 10 m/min (10x8mm)
Vacuum calibration pressure -0.3 +/- 0.05 bar
Cooling water temperature 18 +/- 2 degC
OD tolerance +/- 0.1mm per drawing
Wall thickness 1.0mm min (eccentricity <= 10%)

operations.name: Cut to Length
key_parameters: Cut length COMP-01: 600 +/- 10mm
Cut length COMP-02: 600 +/- 10mm
Cut quality: burr-free, no deformation > 0.2mm
Squareness: +/- 1 deg

operations.name: CNC Tube Bending
key_parameters: Bend radius: >= 2.5x OD (min R20 for 8mm, R25 for 10mm)
Bend angle tolerance: +/- 0.5 deg
Springback compensation: auto per material database
Mandrel: flexible ball mandrel for PA12
Number of bends: 3-5 per tube (estimated, no 3D model)
Ovality at bend: <= 8% of nominal OD

operations.name: End Forming (bead/flare for QC attachment)
operations.equipment_type: Hydraulic end-forming press with heated die
key_parameters: End-form type: bead (retention feature for QC connector)
Bead OD: per PF.90298 spigot spec
Forming temperature: 160 +/- 10 degC (PA12 softening)
Press force: 2.0 +/- 0.3 kN
Dimensional check: bead OD, concentricity, length
Both ends formed (2 operations per tube)

operations.name: QC Connector Assembly (press-fit + verification)
operations.equipment_type: Semi-automatic press station with force-displacement monitoring
key_parameters: O-ring installation: dual FKM + FVMQ per PF.90298
QC press-fit force: 50-67N max per PF.90298
Force-displacement curve monitoring (100%)
Audible click verification for QC latch engagement
Secondary latch engagement check (COMP-04)
COMP-03: 5/16 inch filter side; COMP-04: 3/8 inch engine side

operations.name: Damper Sub-Assembly (press-fit/crimp to tubes)
operations.equipment_type: Crimping station with force monitoring + fixture
key_parameters: Damper inlet press-fit to COMP-01 (feed tube)
Damper outlet press-fit to COMP-02 (return tube)
Crimp force monitoring: force-displacement curve (100%)
Interference fit spec per INTF-03 / INTF-04
Push-out force verification: >= 200N (sample basis)
Nobel Auto damper: incoming inspection per PPAP

operations.name: Final Assembly (anti-abrasion sleeve + clips)
operations.equipment_type: Manual assembly station with fixture + torque tools
key_parameters: Sleeve (COMP-06) position: per routing drawing
Sleeve retention: visual check (position, no gaps)
Clip installation: 3 clips at designated points
Clip insertion force: <= 40N
Clip retention force: >= 100N (sample verification)
Assembly checklist: poka-yoke fixture ensures all clips present

operations.name: 100% Leak Test (pressure decay)
operations.equipment_type: Automated leak test bench (pressure decay method)
key_parameters: Test pressure: 6.75 bar (1.5x WP of 4.5 bar)
Stabilization time: 10 sec
Measurement time: 20 sec
Max allowable decay: 10 Pa/sec (equivalent to 0.5 cc/min)
Test medium: dry air (Class 3 ISO 8573)
100% test — mandatory per DFMEA S=10 failure modes
Auto pass/fail with barcode traceability

operations.name: Cleanliness Check (gravimetric)
key_parameters: Flush volume: 200 mL calibration fluid per part
Filter mesh: 200 um (particle size per spec)
Max residue: per Stellantis cleanliness spec (typically <= 3 mg/m2)
Sample frequency: 100% during launch, then 1/shift SPC
Traceability: part serial number linked to test result

operations.name: Protection Caps Installation + Packaging
key_parameters: Protection caps: both ends (2 pcs, color different from part)
Cap retention force: 2-15N per spec
Label: barcode with part number, serial, date, shift
Packaging: per Stellantis packaging instruction
Visual inspection: final cosmetic check before pack
